title: astragalus visibilis
intro: Astragalus visibilis, also known as the visible milk vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus visibilis include improved immune function, enhanced cardiovascular health, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Astragalus visibilis can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
